$comment: Agent registry for Mission Control. Edit this file to add/remove agents. kind: 'claude-cli' uses the Claude Code CLI bridge; 'cli' runs a local command with the prompt appended (or substituted for {prompt}); 'http' POSTs { prompt } as JSON to `url`. Commands come ONLY from this file on disk — never from the browser.

agents.name: Claude
agents.tagline: Claude Code CLI bridge — full agentic control
